title: Tickeron Identifies Bullish Broadening Top Pattern for GameStop (GME) Stock: A Potential Breakout Opportunity
author: tickeron_community
selftext: On May 11, 2025, Tickeron’s advanced AI-driven pattern recognition technology detected a Broadening Top (Bullish) pattern for GameStop Corp (NYSE: GME), signaling a potential upward breakout for the stock. As of May 13, 2025, at 3:59 PM EDT, GME is trading at $28.40, reflecting a 1.25% increase (+$0.35) from the previous session, with a market capitalization of $3.8 billion.
